channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Summer I Turned Pretty season 3: everything we know so far about the hit Prime Video show’s return
item.description: The Summer I Turned Pretty season 3 officially lands in July. Here's everything we know so far about the hit Prime Video show's return including trailer, cast, plot rumors and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Unblur Image Online: The Ultimate Web App for Unblurring Images
item.description: Discover the incredible power of Unblur Image Online, a web app that can unblur images in seconds, making them look amazing without any investment or effort.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Steve Jobs was probably the last beloved tech leader the world will ever have—and that’s a good thing
item.description: Almost 23 years ago, an employee at Apple described Steve Jobs to me as one of the world’s few “rock star CEOs.” At the time, I didn’t understand why anyone would talk about the head of a company in that way.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: With this simple gadget, you can make great-tasting pour-over coffee with fewer beans
item.description: Brewing coffee is all about extraction, and the right kettle will help enormously. Here's how to choose one.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba has attended the opening ceremony for Expo 2025 Osaka and expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world is plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: Ayaka Mcgill And Mari Yamaguchi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump’s billionaire pick to lead NASA sparks debate over the future of space exploration
item.description: Jared Isaacman, billionaire, CEO and nominee to become the next NASA administrator, faced questions on April 9, 2025, from members of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation during his confirmation hearing for the position.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Social Security Administration 'will be using X to communicate' moving forward
item.description: The shift comes as communications staff at the agency has dwindled due to reassignments in front-facing roles at field offices across the country.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Irish privacy watchdog investigates Elon Musk's X's use of personal data to train Grok AI chatbot
item.description: Ireland’s data privacy watchdog says it’s investigating Elon Musk’s social media platform X over its use of personal data to train his artificial intelligence chatbot Grok.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Commission greenlights Microsoft’s data center plans in North San Jose
item.description: Microsoft is moving forward with a data center project in North San Jose as the tech giant pauses other investment plans around the country
item.dc:creator: Devan Patel, The Mercury News

item.title: Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump
item.description: GOP lawmakers are focused on harmonizing key cyber regulations, including CISA’s proposed incident reporting rule and HHS’ new cyber update to HIPAA. The post Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple has few incentives to start making iPhones in US, despite Trump's trade war with China
item.description: President Donald Trump’s administration has been predicting its barrage of tariffs targeting China will push Apple into manufacturing the iPhone in the U.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Why neurodivergent perspectives are essential in AI development
item.description: It’s impossible to go a day without talking or hearing about AI — and what makes it powerful and potentially dangerous. We’re well past its hype phase and now operate in a world where the technology has become an even more permanent fixture in our lives.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Adding smarts to Azure data lakes with Fabric Data Agents
item.description: Enterprise AI needs one thing if it’s to get around the limitations of large language models and deliver the results businesses need from their agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OPM digitizes federal retirement booklets as part of longtime modernization effort
item.description: OPM said the digital versions of four federal retirement booklets are immediately available for download and should reduce delays for federal retirees. The post OPM digitizes federal retirement booklets as part of longtime modernization effort first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: 200 million social media records leaked in major X data breach
item.description: X hit with massive data breach with 200 million records leaked, including emails. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers seven tips to help protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man who used AI lawyer explains why he did so after judge got angry
item.description: Dewald maintains he received prior approval for his presentation method, though not specifically for an AI-generated speaker.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Broadcom favors stock buyback over investing in innovation
item.description: Broadcom plans to spend its cash pile on buying back as much as $10 billion worth of its common stock, dampening IT department hopes that it might invest in innovation or make its products more affordable.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump's AI Policy Shifts Focus to 'High Impact' Use Cases
item.description: The Trump administration's new AI policy focuses on high-impact use cases, directing agencies to accelerate the adoption of AI technologies and empowering chief AI officers to remove barriers to innovation.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: China’s rare earth export controls threaten enterprise IT hardware supply chains
item.description: China has announced immediate export controls on seven more rare earth elements critical to enterprise IT hardware manufacturing, firing a fresh salvo in the ongoing tech trade war.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zero-emissions hydrogen-electric jet disrupts conventional flights
item.description: Beyond Aero's BYA-1: Hydrogen-electric jet with zero emissions, reduced costs, 2030 launch. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses a potential game changer in the evolution of air travel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
